name: Vegetarian Club Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast 3 slices of bread.
2. In a skillet, heat about 1/4 cup beef or vegetable broth and cook sliced mushrooms and onions over high heat until done. Drain on paper towel.
3. Spread fat-free mayo or salad dressing (or Kraft Ranch Free) and spicy mustard on each slice of bread.
4. Layer thinly sliced tomatoes, cucumbers, low-fat cheese, sprouts, mushrooms, and onions on the sandwiches.
5. If lettuce is affordable, add some.
6. Cut into quarters and enjoy slowly in front of a thinburger and fries eater.
